creator: maciphone2@googlemail.com
text:
yeah, of course the controller hangs on FreeBSD-boot in bootaa64.efi,  not in u-boot...but was worth a try...
thanks for testing everything by "remote-guessing" ;-) ... out of ideas for now ...

HPS has developed a tool called hw.usb.template... where you can set e.g. the voltage( if the second e.g disk causes undervoltage)..
perhaps he'll find the time to take a look into this bug here...
Regards
K.
